name: Oriental Chicken & Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg ramen chicken flavored noodle soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel carrots with Vegetable Peeler; score them with Lemon Zester/Scorer.
2. Cut the carrots and chicken to 1/8-inch thickness using a 3-inch Self-Sharpening Paring Knife.
3. Cut the onion and broccoli using a 3-inch Self-Sharpening Paring Knife.
4. Heat oil in a Stir-Fry Skillet over medium heat.
5. Press garlic into the oil with a Garlic Press.
6. Add onion and chicken; stir-fry for 4 minutes.
7. Dissolve the chicken flavor packet in water and soy sauce using a Mini-Whipper.
8. Break noodles into small pieces and combine with the stir-fry mixture.
9. Cover; reduce heat and simmer for 4-5 minutes or until vegetables are crisp tender.
